hero.subtitle: Book trusted local professionals in minutes. No searching. No comparing. No stress.
hero.description: Unlike traditional marketplaces, Doorstep eliminates the need to browse, compare, and negotiate. We match you with the right provider instantly.

whyDoorstep.title: Why Doorstep?
whyDoorstep.subtitle: We’re not another marketplace. We deliver what the market needs to be simpler, smarter, and fairer.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.description: Getting help at home has never been easier. Three simple steps and you’re done.

steps.title: 1. Select Your Service & Time
steps.desc: Pick what you need and choose your preferred time slot.

steps.title: 2. We Assign a Trusted Provider
steps.desc: Our system instantly matches you with a vetted professional in your area.

steps.title: 3. The Job Gets Done
steps.desc: Your provider arrives on schedule. Hassle-free, guaranteed.

trustedPartner.title: Your trusted partner for home services
trustedPartner.description: Doorstep was founded with a simple mission: make it effortless to find reliable, affordable home service professionals. We’ve helped thousands of homeowners get the help they need from leaky faucets to full home makeovers.

benefits.title: Trust & Safety
benefits.desc: Every professional is background-checked and vetted before joining our platform.

benefits.title: Customer First
benefits.desc: We’re obsessed with your satisfaction guaranteed on every service, every time.

benefits.title: Quality Work
benefits.desc: Only top-rated pros make the cut. We maintain the highest standards in the industry.

services.title: What do you need help with?
services.subtitle: Select a service to get started

testimonials.title: What Our Customers Say
testimonials.subtitle: Don’t take our word for it—hear from homeowners who trust Doorstep.

list.name: Sarah M.
list.content: “Doorstep made finding a plumber so easy. The pro arrived on time, fixed the issue quickly, and the pricing was completely transparent. Highly recommend!”

list.name: James R.
list.content: “I manage 12 rental properties and Doorstep is my go-to for maintenance. The quality of work is consistently excellent and the booking process is seamless.”

list.name: Emily T.
list.content: “I was skeptical at first, but the background-checked professionals and satisfaction guarantee gave me confidence. The cleaning service was outstanding.”

list.name: Daniel K.
list.content: “We used Doorstep for electrical, HVAC, and handyman services. Every single time, the experience has been top-notch.”

list.name: Lisa P.
list.content: “The same-day availability is a game changer. Had an emergency plumbing issue and a pro was at my door within 2 hours. Amazing service!”

list.name: Michael W.
list.content: “We use Doorstep for our office maintenance needs. The professionals are always courteous and skilled. The Stripe payments mean invoicing is breezy.”

items.question: How are your professionals vetted?
items.answer: Every professional undergoes a rigorous background check, insurance verification, and interview process.

items.question: What happens if I’m not satisfied?
items.answer: Our Doorstep Guarantee means if you're not happy, we'll work with you to make it right, including re-performing the service.

items.question: How does pricing work?
items.answer: We provide transparent, flat-rate pricing based on the service type and size of the job. No hidden fees.

items.question: Can I book same-day service?
items.answer: Yes! Depending on provider availability in your area, you can often book services for the same day.

items.question: Is my payment information secure?
items.answer: Absolutely. We use Stripe for all payment processing, ensuring your data is encrypted and secure.

items.question: Can I cancel or reschedule?
items.answer: You can cancel or reschedule easily through our platform. We ask for 24 hours notice to avoid a late fee.

cta.title: Ready to get started?
cta.description: Book a service in under 60 seconds. No commitments, transparent pricing, and satisfaction guaranteed on every single job.

footer.description: The smarter way to handle your home. Book trusted local professionals in minutes.
